15	        "min_price": request.args.get("min_price", type=float),

18	        "page": int(request.args.get("page", 1)),
19	        "page_size": min(int(request.args.get("page_size", 20)), 100),
20	    }
21	    # Collect attribute filters: attributes[key]=value query params
22	    attributes = {}
23	    for key, value in request.args.items():
24	        if key.startswith("attributes[") and key.endswith("]"):
25	            attr_key = key[len("attributes["):-1]
26	            if attr_key:
27	                attributes[attr_key] = value
28	    if attributes:
29	        params["attributes"] = attributes
